subject.description: Inline reference to a catalog work. NeoDB items are not ATProto records, so a work is referenced by URL (its NeoDB permalink and source site URLs) rather than a strongRef.

uri.description: Permalink to the work on the originating NeoDB instance.

category.description: Broad media category of the work. Open set; future NeoDB versions may add values.

type.description: Specific NeoDB item class (mirrors the NeoDB API schema), distinguishing entities that share a category, e.g. TVShow / TVSeason / TVEpisode, Podcast / PodcastEpisode, Performance / PerformanceProduction, Edition, Movie, Album, Game.

cover.description: Absolute URL of the work's cover image, when present.

sources.description: URLs of the external source records the work was matched from (IMDB, TMDB, Douban, Goodreads, etc.), referenced by URL rather than raw id.

identifiers.description: Standardized identifiers of the work. Only standard, site-independent identifier types are included (e.g. isbn, imdb, wikidata, asin, gtin, isrc); site-specific ids are conveyed as URLs in sources instead.

type.description: Identifier namespace, e.g. isbn, imdb, wikidata.

rating.description: A numeric rating on a 1..max scale.
